case_title: XUE NA MA VS. LONNIE VICTORIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY MA, XUE NA AS TO DEFENDANT VICTORIA, LONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, XUE NA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUN-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VICTORIA, LONNIE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VICTORIA, LONNIE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VICTORIA, LONNIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY BENJAMIN GIANG--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANITA VAN BUYTEN---HUMAN RESOURCES MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-08-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR HER CASE TODAY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY BONNY LIN- MANDARIN INTERPRETER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. MANDARIN INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF TODAY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, XUE NA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VICTORIA, LONNIE PARTIES AGREE TO ADD LONNIE VICTORIA'S EMPLOYER, EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES, AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT WHO WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
